steps.title: Identify the goal and the relevant information
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize the SIZE of Tepeapulco. Looking at the notes, the only information that directly addresses size is: “Tepeapulco covers an area of roughly 243 km².” To accomplish the goal, the answer must include this specific measurement.

steps.title: Match the goal to the answer choices
steps.content:
Choice D is the only one that includes the 243 km² measurement and uses it to convey Tepeapulco's size, directly fulfilling the rhetorical goal.

Choices A, B, and C omit the size measurement entirely—discussing water treatment, public services, or the number of municipalities instead—and therefore fail to emphasize size.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
